mapper.sql:
AND PA.ACTIVITY = 1 AND 1 = 0
AND (PA.ITEM_ID LIKE '%' || #{itemNameSearch, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '%' OR SY3.CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{itemNameSearch, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '%')
mapper.select: SELECT P.ITEM_TYPE, P.PARAM_ITEM_NO AS ITEM_NO, P.PARAM_ITEM_ID AS ITEM_ID, P.MAP_CODE, P.DATA_TYPE, P.DESCR, P.ACTIVITY, (SELECT CONTENT FROM SY_GLOBAL_NAME WHERE NO = P.PARAM_ITEM_NO AND LANGUAGE = 'en') AS NAME_EN, (SELECT CONTENT FROM SY_GLOBAL_NAME WHERE NO = P.PARAM_ITEM_NO AND LANGUAGE = 'ko') AS NAME_KO, (SELECT CONTENT FROM SY_GLOBAL_NAME WHERE NO = P.PARAM_ITEM_NO AND LANGUAGE = 'vi') AS NAME_VI, (SELECT CONTENT FROM SY_GLOBAL_NAME WHERE NO = P.PARAM_ITEM_NO AND LANGUAGE = 'zh') AS NAME_ZH FROM PA_PARAM_ITEM P WHERE P.PARAM_ITEM_NO = #{itemNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT 6 AS ITEM_TYPE, PA.ITEM_NO, PA.ITEM_ID, PA.MAP_CODE, PA.DATATYPE AS DATA_TYPE, PA.DESCR, PA.ACTIVITY, (SELECT CONTENT FROM SY_GLOBAL_NAME WHERE NO = PA.ITEM_NO AND LANGUAGE = 'en') AS NAME_EN, (SELECT CONTENT FROM SY_GLOBAL_NAME WHERE NO = PA.ITEM_NO AND LANGUAGE = 'ko') AS NAME_KO, (SELECT CONTENT FROM SY_GLOBAL_NAME WHERE NO = PA.ITEM_NO AND LANGUAGE = 'vi') AS NAME_VI, (SELECT CONTENT FROM SY_GLOBAL_NAME WHERE NO = PA.ITEM_NO AND LANGUAGE = 'zh') AS NAME_ZH FROM PA_ITEM PA WHERE PA.ITEM_NO = #{itemNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PA_PARAM_ITEM ( PARAM_ITEM_NO, PARAM_ITEM_ID, DATA_TYPE, DESCR, MAP_CODE, ITEM_TYPE, ACTIVITY, CREATED_BY, CREATED_IP, CREATE_DATE ) VALUES ( #{itemNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{itemId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dataType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{descr, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{mapCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{itemType, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, 1, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE )

INSERT INTO PA_ITEM ( ITEM_NO, ITEM_ID, DATATYPE, DESCR, MAP_CODE, ACTIVITY, ORDERNO, CREATED_BY, CREATED_IP, CREATE_DATE ) VALUES ( #{itemNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{itemId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dataType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{descr, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{mapCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 1, (SELECT NVL(MAX(ORDERNO), 0) + 1 FROM PA_ITEM), #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE PA_PARAM_ITEM SET PARAM_ITEM_ID = #{itemId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DATA_TYPE = #{dataType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DESCR = #{descr, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MAP_CODE = #{mapCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATED_BY = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATED_IP = #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE PARAM_ITEM_NO = #{itemNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

UPDATE PA_ITEM SET ITEM_ID = #{itemId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DATATYPE = #{dataType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DESCR = #{descr, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MAP_CODE = #{mapCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATED_BY = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATED_IP = #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE ITEM_NO = #{itemNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
UPDATE PA_PARAM_ITEM SET ACTIVITY = 0, UPDATED_BY = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATED_IP = #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE PARAM_ITEM_NO = #{itemNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
UPDATE PA_ITEM SET ACTIVITY = 0, UPDATED_BY = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATED_IP = #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE ITEM_NO = #{itemNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: SELECT CPNY_ID FROM PA_PARAM_ITEM_PARAM WHERE PARAM_ITEM_NO = #{itemNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND ACTIVITY = 1
SELECT CPNY_ID FROM PA_ITEM_PARAM WHERE ITEM_NO = #{itemNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND ACTIVITY = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PA_PARAM_ITEM_PARAM ( PARAM_NO, PARAM_ITEM_NO, CPNY_ID, ACTIVITY, ORDERNO, APPLY_TYPE, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY ) VALUES ( PA_PARAM_ITEM_PARAM_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{itemNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{selectedCpny, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 1, (SELECT NVL(MAX(ORDERNO), 0) + 1 FROM PA_PARAM_ITEM_PARAM WHERE PARAM_ITEM_NO = #{itemNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}), 1, SYSDATE, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )

INSERT INTO PA_ITEM_PARAM ( PARAM_NO, ITEM_NO, CPNY_ID, CALCU_ORDER, ACTIVITY, APPLY_TYPE, ORDERNO, HAVE_FORMULAR, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY ) VALUES ( PA_ITEM_PARAM_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{itemNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{selectedCpny, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, (SELECT NVL(MAX(T.CALCU_ORDER), 0) + 1 FROM PA_ITEM_PARAM T WHERE T.CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}), 1, 1, (SELECT NVL(MAX(ORDERNO), 0) + 1 FROM PA_ITEM_PARAM WHERE ITEM_NO = #{itemNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}), 0, SYSDATE, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.update: UPDATE PA_PARAM_ITEM_PARAM SET ACTIVITY = 0, UPDATED_BY = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE PARAM_ITEM_NO = #{itemNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND ACTIVITY = 1
UPDATE PA_ITEM_PARAM SET ACTIVITY = 0, UPDATED_BY = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE ITEM_NO = #{itemNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND ACTIVITY = 1

MERGE INTO SY_GLOBAL_NAME T USING (SELECT #{no, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS NO, #{language, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS LANGUAGE FROM DUAL) S ON (T.NO = S.NO AND T.LANGUAGE = S.LANGUAGE) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET T.CONTENT = #{content, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, T.UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE, T.UPDATED_BY = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (SEQ, NO, LANGUAGE, CONTENT, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY, UPDATE_DATE, UPDATED_BY, ACTIVITY, ORDERNO) VALUES (SY_GLOBAL_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{no, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{language, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{content, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 1, 1)
